metadata.description: Static analysis heatmap detecting five categories of legacy patterns and unused files in eduagents3.0 pipeline

summary.keyInsight: Legacy item field mappings (prompt/answer/options/passage) remain in orchestrator, builder, writer fallback paths, and Scribe exporter. Direct slot mutations appear in Architect. Unused-file heatmap category added; initial scan pending.

categoryA_legacyWriterFields.description: Writer metadata fields appearing outside metadata context (difficulty, cognitiveDemand, questionType, templateId, etc.)

locations.issue: Slots mutated directly rather than through governed builder/normalization pattern
locations.recommendation: Use immutable update pattern or metadata builder

locations.code: compensation.difficulty = `Match ${domain} difficulty exactly to the blueprint.`;
locations.issue: Assigns string description to difficulty field that should be enum
locations.recommendation: Use separate description field or rename to compensationReason

categoryB_legacyInferenceLogic.description: Legacy inference functions (guess, infer, fallback, defaultDifficulty, determineQuestionType, etc.)
categoryB_legacyInferenceLogic.note: No legacy inference functions detected. All fallback logic is legitimate Writer routing.

categoryC_legacyBlueprintCoupling.note: Blueprint coupling properly isolated to Orchestrator.

categoryD_legacyItemShapes.description: Items using prompt|answer|options|passage fields directly without metadata wrapper context

locations.issue: Dual-schema state created by mapping legacy fields
locations.recommendation: Move all legacy → modern mapping into itemNormalizer
locations.risk: Schema drift at orchestrator entry point

locations.issue: Writer fallback path assumes flat prompt

locations.risk: Breaks for multi-part and template-driven items

categoryE_unusedFiles.description: Files in src/pipeline/** not reachable from any pipeline entry point (orchestrator, Architect V3 planners, Writer, Gatekeeper, Builder, Scribe). Indicates dead code, deprecated agents, unused templates, or legacy utilities.
categoryE_unusedFiles.note: Reachability analysis not yet executed. Once implemented, this category will surface all files never imported or referenced by the active pipeline.

refactoringPriority.reason: Final exporter must handle metadata-only items
Identify and remove dead code paths

writer.note: Writer agent has no blueprint.* references

orchestrator.note: Owns blueprint routing but duplicates normalization logic

nextSteps: 1. Create itemNormalizer.ts as single-source-of-truth for legacy → modern schema mapping
2. Refactor Orchestrator and Builder to use itemNormalizer
3. Add metadata-aware accessors: getPrompt, getAnswer, getOptions, getPassage
4. Update Scribe exporter to use accessors
5. Update Gatekeeper validation to use accessors
6. Remove direct slot mutations in adjustPlanForTime
7. Run full integration tests on dry-run suite
8. Add reachability heatmap to reporting script: build import graph, walk from pipeline entry points, surface unused files
9. Remove or archive unused files; update CI guard to prevent reintroduction
